title: Cobblemon - Apricorn Bushes
description: Small custom bushes for each of the Apricorn trees in Cobblemon
body:
Enhance your Cobblemon adventure with this fantastic addon mod! Introducing custom spawning Apricorn Bushes that correspond to each type of apricorn found in Cobblemon. These beautiful bushes add more depth to your Minecraft world, providing a unique and immersive experience.

Discover and collect Apricorns from the vibrant Apricorn Bushes as you explore your surroundings. Each bush represents a specific apricorn type, adding a touch of authenticity to your gameplay. Use these Apricorns to craft Poké Balls, healing items, and other essential tools for your Pokémon journey.

With the custom spawning Apricorn Bushes, you'll enjoy an enhanced Pokémon experience within the Minecraft universe. Immerse yourself in the world of Cobblemon and unleash your inner Pokémon trainer today!
